description:
This space enables in-depth analysis of eToro users' buying power, trading activity, and position exposures across products, combining customer, position, instrument, leverage, and liability data.

**Capabilities:**
- Identify and segment customers by buying power, regulatory regime, and loyalty tier (PlayerLevel)
- Analyze customer trading activity and exposures, including position amounts, leverage, and P&L by asset class (stocks, crypto, futures, margin)
- Assess liabilities, assets under management (AUM), bonus credits, and realizable equity at customer and portfolio level
- Track instruments traded, instrument types, and regulatory compliance parameters such as leverage limits by country/entity
- Evaluate detailed position-level metrics including commissions, hedge status, settlement type (CFD vs real), and copy-trading relationships
- Measure portfolio risk and analyze copy-trading performance and impact

**Limitations:**
- No access to full PII or customer-sensitive data (only masked customer attributes available)
- Cannot analyze intra-day trading activity; all metrics are daily snapshots
- Historical thresholds for PlayerLevel (realized equity required) not available due to schema drift
- Limited to the listed asset classes and dimensions; does not track non-trade financial products or off-platform activity
serialized_space:
{
  "version": 2,
  "data_sources": {
    "tables": [
      {
        "identifier": "main.bi_db.bronze_fivetran_compliance_leverage_settings_data"
      },

        "identifier": "main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_positionpnl"
      },
      {
        "identifier": "main.dwh.dim_position"
      },
      {
        "identifier": "main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_country"
      },
      {
        "identifier": "main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_customer_masked"
      },
      {
        "identifier": "main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_instrument"
      },
      {
        "identifier": "main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_playerlevel"
      },
      {
        "identifier": "main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_liabilities"
      }
    ]
  },
  "instructions": {
    "text_instructions": [
      {
        "id": "01f14240f4ca1901b52d410fcfd06041",
        "content": [
          "### Buying Power X4 Rollout Plan - Pipeline Logic\n",
          "The Buying Power Rollout Plan estimates revenue from offering buying power (margin loans) to eligible customers. The pipeline has these steps:\n",
          "\n",
          "1. **CountryClubPool**: Filter customers with PlayerLevelID in (2,3,6) = Gold/Platinum/Platinum Plus AND CountryID in (74,79,102,218,217) = Italy/Germany/France/UK/UAE\n",
          "2. **CFDEnabledCID**: Customers who opened CFD positions (IsSettled=0) in 2025\n",
          "3. **EligibleOP**: Sum of NOP for settled positions on ~900+ eligible instruments, filtered to eligibleop >= 625 (X4 threshold, lowered from $2,500)\n",
          "4. **maxLeverageSettings**: Max leverage per instrument from compliance data for CySEC/FCA/ASIC regulators\n",
          "5. **leverageUtilization**: Leverage utilization rate per customer based on open positions\n",
          "6. **CFDStats**: CFD position counts and last position date by year (2023-2026)\n",
          "7. **CashUtilizationRate**: Account value = positions + PnL + cash; utilization = positions/account value\n",
          "8. **PositionPerDollar**: Average positions per dollar of cash for 2023, 2024, 2025\n",
          "9. **revenuePerDollar**: Per-customer revenue metrics (commission per dollar, ON fee estimate, avg duration/leverage), LIMIT 240000, with randomized row numbering for batch assignment\n",
          "\n",
          "Revenue model assumptions: 50% utilization, 6.4% annual interest rate, 15bps commission. Batches: 1-40K / 40K-80K / 80K+ (X4 scaled from 10K/20K/20K+).\n",
          "\n",
          "Three scenarios:\n",
          "- **Conservative**: Loans close when margin position closes; all positions pay 15bps\n",
          "- **Medium**: Loans stay out for entire period; all positions pay 15bps\n",
          "- **Aggressive**: Loans stay out for entire period; 1/3 of positions pay $1 flat fee, 2/3 pay 15bps"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "example_question_sqls": [
      {
        "id": "01f14240f49818ce8427a68b7d3844c3",
        "question": [
          "Customer-level buying power detail with country and club"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "select\n",
          "aa.CID,\n",
          "aa.EligibleOP,\n",
          "aa.Commission,\n",
          "aa.CommissionPerDollar,\n",
          "aa.CFDVolume,\n",
          "aa.RealVolume,\n",
          "aa.Volume,\n",
          "aa.ONFeeEstimate,\n",
          "aa.RevenuePerDollarVolume,\n",
          "aa.AvgDuration,\n",
          "aa.AvgCFDDuration,\n",
          "aa.AvgRealDuration,\n",
          "aa.AvgLeverage,\n",
          "bb.PositionPerDollar2023,\n",
          "bb.PositionPerDollar2024,\n",
          "bb.PositionPerDollar2025,\n",
          "dd.Name as Country,\n",
          "ee.Name as Club\n",
          "from \n",
          "revenueperdollar aa\n",
          "join positionperdollar bb on aa.CID = bb.CID\n",
          "join main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_customer_masked cc on aa.CID = cc.RealCID\n",
          "join main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_country dd on cc.CountryID = dd.CountryID\n",
          "join main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_playerlevel ee on cc.PlayerLevelID = ee.PlayerLevelID"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f14240f4981e0eaaa0fab0a66832cc",
        "question": [
          "Conservative revenue estimate by rollout batch"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "-- Conservative Estimate - Loans stay out only for the duration of the margin position and are closed when the margin position is closed and all positions pay 15bps\n",
          "select \n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn <= 40000, ((aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP - aa.EligibleOP + aa.EligibleOP) * 0.5) * 0.064/365 * aa.AvgDuration +\n",
          "aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP *0.5 * aa.CommissionPerDollar * least(bb.PositionPerDollar2025, bb.PositionPerDollar2024, bb.PositionPerDollar2023), 0)) FirstBatchRevenueEstimate, \n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn > 40000 and aa.rn <= 80000,  ((aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP - aa.EligibleOP + aa.EligibleOP) * 0.5) * 0.064/365 * aa.AvgDuration +\n",
          "aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP *0.5 * aa.CommissionPerDollar * least(bb.PositionPerDollar2025, bb.PositionPerDollar2024, bb.PositionPerDollar2023), 0)) SecondBatchRevenueEstimate,\n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn > 80000,  \n",
          "((aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP - aa.EligibleOP + aa.EligibleOP) * 0.5) * 0.064/365 * aa.AvgDuration + \n",
          "aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP *0.5 * aa.CommissionPerDollar * least(bb.PositionPerDollar2025, bb.PositionPerDollar2024, bb.PositionPerDollar2023), 0)) ThirdBatchRevenueEstimate\n",
          "from revenuePerDollar aa\n",
          "join PositionPerDollar bb on aa.CID = bb.CID"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f14240f49911ffa693e8097510780e",
        "question": [
          "Conservative revenue breakdown by component and batch"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "-- Conservative Estimate - Loans stay out only for the duration of the margin position and are closed when the margin position is closed and all positions pay 15bps\n",
          "select \n",
          "sum(IFF(\n",
          "aa.rn <= 40000, \n",
          "((aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP - aa.EligibleOP) * 0.5) * 0.064/365 * aa.AvgDuration\n",
          ", 0)) FirstBatch_NewPositionInterest, \n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn <= 40000,\n",
          "aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP *0.5 * aa.CommissionPerDollar * least(bb.PositionPerDollar2025, bb.PositionPerDollar2024, bb.PositionPerDollar2023)\n",
          ", 0)) FirstBatch_NewPositionCommission, \n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn <= 40000, \n",
          "(aa.EligibleOP * 0.5) * 0.064/365 * aa.AvgDuration\n",
          ", 0)) FirstBatch_LoanInterest, \n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn > 40000 and aa.rn <= 80000,  \n",
          "((aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP - aa.EligibleOP) * 0.5) * 0.064/365 * aa.AvgDuration\n",
          ", 0)) SecondBatch_NewPositionInterest,\n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn > 40000 and aa.rn <= 80000,\n",
          "aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP *0.5 * aa.CommissionPerDollar * least(bb.PositionPerDollar2025, bb.PositionPerDollar2024, bb.PositionPerDollar2023)\n",
          ", 0)) SecondBatch_NewPositionCommission,\n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn > 40000 and aa.rn <= 80000,  \n",
          "(aa.EligibleOP * 0.5) * 0.064/365 * aa.AvgDuration\n",
          ", 0)) SecondBatch_LoanInterest,\n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn > 80000,  \n",
          "((aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP - aa.EligibleOP) * 0.5) * 0.064/365 * aa.AvgDuration\n",
          ", 0)) ThirdBatch_NewPositionInterest,\n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn > 80000,  \n",
          "aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP *0.5 * aa.CommissionPerDollar * least(bb.PositionPerDollar2025, bb.PositionPerDollar2024, bb.PositionPerDollar2023)\n",
          ", 0)) ThirdBatch_NewPositionCommission,\n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn > 80000,  \n",
          "(aa.EligibleOP * 0.5) * 0.064/365 * aa.AvgDuration\n",
          ", 0)) ThirdBatch_LoanInterest\n",
          "from revenuePerDollar aa\n",
          "join PositionPerDollar bb on aa.CID = bb.CID"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f14240f49916029b38cf385bb65310",
        "question": [
          "Medium revenue breakdown by component and batch"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "-- Medium Estimate - Loans stay out for the entire period and all positions pay 15bps\n",
          "select \n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn <= 40000, \n",
          "((aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP - aa.EligibleOP) * 0.5) * 0.064/365 * aa.AvgDuration, 0)) \n",
          "FirstBatch_NewPositionInterest, \n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn <= 40000, \n",
          "aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP *0.5 * aa.CommissionPerDollar * least(bb.PositionPerDollar2025, bb.PositionPerDollar2024, bb.PositionPerDollar2023), 0)) \n",
          "FirstBatch_NewPositionCommission, \n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn <= 40000, \n",
          "aa.EligibleOP*0.5* 0.064\n",
          ", 0)) \n",
          "FirstBatch_LoanInterest, \n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn > 40000 and aa.rn <= 80000,  \n",
          "((aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP - aa.EligibleOP) * 0.5) * 0.064/365 * aa.AvgDuration, 0)) \n",
          "SecondBatch_NewPositionInterest,\n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn > 40000 and aa.rn <= 80000,  \n",
          "aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP *0.5 * aa.CommissionPerDollar * least(bb.PositionPerDollar2025, bb.PositionPerDollar2024, bb.PositionPerDollar2023), 0)) \n",
          "SecondBatch_NewPositionCommission,\n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn > 40000 and aa.rn <= 80000,  \n",
          "aa.EligibleOP*0.5* 0.064\n",
          ", 0)) \n",
          "SecondBatch_LoanInterest,\n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn > 80000,  \n",
          "((aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP - aa.EligibleOP) * 0.5) * 0.064/365 * aa.AvgDuration, 0)) \n",
          "ThirdBatch_NewPositionInterest,\n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn > 80000,  \n",
          "aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP *0.5 * aa.CommissionPerDollar * least(bb.PositionPerDollar2025, bb.PositionPerDollar2024, bb.PositionPerDollar2023), 0)) \n",
          "ThirdBatch_NewPositionCommission,\n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn > 80000,  \n",
          "aa.EligibleOP*0.5* 0.064\n",
          ", 0)) \n",
          "ThirdBatch_LoanInterest\n",
          "from revenuePerDollar aa\n",
          "join PositionPerDollar bb on aa.CID = bb.CID"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f14240f4991958848ad197f94a7202",
        "question": [
          "Aggressive revenue breakdown by component and batch"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "--Aggressive Estimate - Loans stay out for the entire period and 1/3 of positions pay a flat fee of 1 usd  while the other 2/3 pay the standard 15 basis points\n",
          "select \n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn <= 40000, \n",
          "((aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP - aa.EligibleOP) * 0.5) * 0.064/365 * aa.AvgDuration, 0)) \n",
          "FirstBatch_NewPositionInterest, \n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn <= 40000, \n",
          "aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP *0.5 * aa.CommissionPerDollar * least(bb.PositionPerDollar2025, bb.PositionPerDollar2024, bb.PositionPerDollar2023) * 2/3\n",
          "+ aa.EligibleOP *0.5 * least(bb.PositionPerDollar2025, bb.PositionPerDollar2024, bb.PositionPerDollar2023) * 1/3, 0)) \n",
          "FirstBatch_NewPositionCommission, \n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn <= 40000, \n",
          "aa.EligibleOP*0.5* 0.064\n",
          ", 0)) \n",
          "FirstBatch_LoanInterest, \n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn > 40000 and aa.rn <= 80000,  \n",
          "((aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP - aa.EligibleOP) * 0.5) * 0.064/365 * aa.AvgDuration, 0)) \n",
          "SecondBatch_NewPositionInterest,\n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn > 40000 and aa.rn <= 80000,   \n",
          "aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP *0.5 * aa.CommissionPerDollar * least(bb.PositionPerDollar2025, bb.PositionPerDollar2024, bb.PositionPerDollar2023) * 2/3\n",
          "+ aa.EligibleOP *0.5 * least(bb.PositionPerDollar2025, bb.PositionPerDollar2024, bb.PositionPerDollar2023) * 1/3\n",
          ", 0)) \n",
          "SecondBatch_NewPositionCommission,\n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn > 40000 and aa.rn <= 80000,  \n",
          "aa.EligibleOP*0.5* 0.064, 0)) \n",
          "SecondBatch_LoanInterest,\n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn > 80000,  \n",
          "((aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP - aa.EligibleOP) * 0.5) * 0.064/365 * aa.AvgDuration, 0)) \n",
          "ThirdBatch_NewPositionInterest,\n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn > 80000,  \n",
          "aa.AvgLeverage * aa.EligibleOP *0.5 * aa.CommissionPerDollar * least(bb.PositionPerDollar2025, bb.PositionPerDollar2024, bb.PositionPerDollar2023) * 2/3\n",
          "+ aa.EligibleOP *0.5 * least(bb.PositionPerDollar2025, bb.PositionPerDollar2024, bb.PositionPerDollar2023) * 1/3\n",
          ", 0)) \n",
          "ThirdBatch_NewPositionCommission,\n",
          "sum(IFF(aa.rn > 80000,  \n",
          "aa.EligibleOP*0.5* 0.064, 0)) \n",
          "ThirdBatch_LoanInterest\n",
          "from revenuePerDollar aa\n",
          "join PositionPerDollar bb on aa.CID = bb.CID"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f14240f4991e7799fe85f7a29bb3a2",
        "question": [
          "Assign customers to rollout batches with country and club"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "select aa.CID, cc.Name as Country, dd.Name as Club, \n",
          "case \n",
          "when aa.rn <= 40000 then 1\n",
          "when aa.rn > 40000 and aa.rn <= 80000 then 2 \n",
          "when aa.rn >80000 then 3 \n",
          "end BatchNo\n",
          "from revenuePerDollar aa\n",
          "join main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_customer_masked bb on aa.CID = bb.RealCID\n",
          "join main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_country cc on bb.CountryID = cc.CountryID\n",
          "join main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_playerlevel dd on bb.PlayerLevelID = dd.PlayerLevelID"
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}
title: Buying Power - Rollout Plan Analysis
